## Problem

What operator, engineer, analyst, or technician problem should this solve?

## Proposed Approach

Describe the smallest useful implementation.

- [ ] Control Center

## Data And Safety Considerations

Does this touch any of the following?

- [ ] Credentials or tokens
- [ ] Device configuration changes
- [ ] Raw packet captures
- [ ] Customer data
- [ ] Cloud accounts
- [ ] External AI/API calls
- [ ] Destructive response actions

If yes, describe the safety model.

Is this needed now, or should it be documented as future work?
